title: How to Access Apps and Services in China Without a VPN
metaDescription: Practical tips for tourists on using essential apps and services seamlessly during your trip to China.

sections.heading: h1
sections.content: Before arriving, download key Chinese apps. Prepare for a different digital environment where international services may be limited, but fantastic local alternatives thrive.

sections.heading: h2
sections.content: Purchase a local SIM card or eSIM upon arrival for reliable mobile data. Use it to access local app stores and download essential services like WeChat, Alipay, and navigation apps.

sections.heading: h3
sections.content: For communication, use WeChat. For payments, set up Alipay with a foreign card. For maps, use Baidu Maps or Amap. Many hotels also offer helpful digital guides.

keyTakeaways: Download WeChat, Alipay, and a translation app before you arrive.
Buy a local SIM/eSIM for mobile data and easy app downloads.
Use local alternatives: Baidu Maps for navigation, Dianping for reviews.
